1126.issue: [W1126] [io-package.json](https://github.com/misanorot/ioBroker.alarm/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "zone.two" common.role is mandatory and must be a non-empty string

1127.issue: [W1127] [io-package.json](https://github.com/misanorot/ioBroker.alarm/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "use.list" common.states must be number or string

1132.issue: [W1132] [io-package.json](https://github.com/misanorot/ioBroker.alarm/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "zone.two" common.role "" is not a known ioBroker state role

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/misanorot/ioBroker.alarm/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.2" at [package.json](https://github.com/misanorot/ioBroker.alarm/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
